documents.title: Certificate of Divestiture OGE-2025-128
documents.summary: OGE-issued Certificate of Divestiture providing tax-deferral treatment for a specific qualifying divestiture. Document content is not publicly downloadable; available via Form 201 request from OGE.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Letter signed by John Phelan committing to specific divestitures, recusals and resignations to avoid conflicts of interest in the Secretary of the Navy role. See PDF for the full enumerated commitments.

documents.title: Nominee 278
documents.summary: Public financial disclosure filed before Senate confirmation. Lists assets, income sources, liabilities and outside positions held at time of nomination for the Secretary of the Navy role. See PDF for itemized holdings.
